chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1293 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 16-05-2024 Mr. Sikandar Ali Junejo, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Mujeeb-ul-Rehman Mahar, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G. ***** A cheque of Rs.7,94,758/-has been given to the petitioner, who is present in person, which is entire outstanding amount in respect of his pensionery benefits. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
